text: Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Showers will ease off later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds, occasionally force 5.
